name: prompt-stash
title: Prompt Stash
description: Keep a FIFO stash of prompts and paste them into OpenCode when you decide.
author: Inakitajes

commands.name: add-prompt
commands.title: Add Prompt
commands.description: Add a prompt to the FIFO stash.

commands.name: pop-prompt
commands.title: Pop Prompt
commands.description: Paste the oldest stashed prompt into the frontmost app and archive it.

commands.name: manage-prompts
commands.title: Manage Prompts
commands.description: View, paste, restore, and delete stashed prompts.
